evals.prompt: Acabo de pasar Lighthouse en desktop a La Nonna y me salen estos scores: Performance 74, Accessibility 88, SEO 82, Best Practices 95. Las auditorías fallidas más destacadas son: 'Largest Contentful Paint 3.4s', 'Eliminate render-blocking resources', 'Image elements do not have explicit width and height', y 'Links do not have a discernible name' (en el LanguageSwitcher que es un botón de icono sin aria-label). ¿Por dónde empiezo y cómo lo arreglo?
evals.expected_output: Priorización clara de los fixes por impacto, código para cada fix (aria-label en LanguageSwitcher, sizes en imágenes, etc.), y estimación de mejora en el score de Lighthouse.

assertions.name: identifies-lcp-as-priority
assertions.description: LCP 3.4s is identified as the main performance bottleneck to fix first

assertions.name: provides-aria-label-fix
assertions.description: Response includes concrete code for adding aria-label to the LanguageSwitcher button element

assertions.name: addresses-all-four-audits
assertions.description: All 4 failing audits are addressed: LCP, render-blocking resources, image dimensions, and link names

assertions.name: includes-working-code
assertions.description: At least one complete, executable code fix is provided (not just abstract advice)

assertions.name: provides-score-estimate
assertions.description: Response estimates expected score improvement after fixes

evals.prompt: Quiero añadir Lighthouse CI a La Nonna para que corra automáticamente en cada PR a main en GitHub. El deploy está en Vercel. Necesito que el PR falle si Performance baja de 85 o Accessibility baja de 90. El proyecto usa Next.js 15 con 17 páginas SSG. Dame la configuración completa.
evals.expected_output: lighthouserc.js con los thresholds correctos (performance ≥ 0.85, accessibility ≥ 0.90), GitHub Actions workflow YAML completo, e instrucciones para el LHCI_GITHUB_APP_TOKEN.

assertions.name: includes-lighthouserc-js
assertions.description: Response includes a complete lighthouserc.js configuration file

assertions.name: correct-performance-threshold
assertions.description: lighthouserc sets performance threshold at minScore 0.85 (not 0.84 or 0.9)

assertions.name: correct-accessibility-threshold
assertions.description: lighthouserc sets accessibility threshold at minScore 0.90 (not 0.88 or 0.95)

assertions.name: includes-github-actions-yaml
assertions.description: Response includes a complete GitHub Actions workflow YAML with proper steps (checkout, node setup, build, lhci)

assertions.name: mentions-lhci-token
assertions.description: Response mentions the LHCI_GITHUB_APP_TOKEN secret and how to set it up
